[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a mobile app screen with a dark-themed comments/replies interface overlaid on a sunset-themed game or video background.

Setting:
The upper portion displays an outdoor-looking scene with a road, buildings, and a tall lantern-like structure against a colorful twilight sky. The rest of the screen shows an interface overlay with multiple comment entries and a premium claim bar.

Visual Details:
A dark translucent overlay covers most of the screen. At the top, small icons and status-like indicators are visible, including a time reading “1.31” and several social or app icons, along with signal and battery-style indicators. In the middle, there is a large heading “Replis” on the left and a close “X” on the right. Below this header, a highlighted comment card shows a username line with a small check mark and several purple and blue pill-shaped elements. A large rounded blue bar near the center contains a crown icon, the text “7 Hari Premium,” the line “Tersisa 45 dari 50,” and a white rounded button labeled “Klaim.” Beneath that, additional comment threads are visible, including text lines that read “gas,” “makasih,” and “makasih” again. One comment includes a blue “Reply” link. Another section shows “Legendar[y]” in an orange pill on the right. At the bottom, a grey input field contains the text “Tulis balasan...” and near the lower right is a send or arrow icon. The background behind the UI includes a road perspective with a center line and silhouettes of small figures or objects near the center distance.

Practical Summary:
It is a screenshot of a mobile app showing a comment/reply section titled “Replis” with multiple user comment entries. A blue “7 Hari Premium” claim banner with a “Klaim” button is displayed on top of a sunset-like game background.

# Notes
- Some characters/emojis are partially stylized/unclear due to the screenshot resolution (e.g., “Repl﻿ies”, “Legendar﻿y”).

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
